title: Npm Assemble Executor Schema
description: Assemble npm package from transpiled sources, bin, license, dist files and meta

transpiledDir.description: Transpiled ESM+CJS sources dir (relative to project root).

jsSrcDir.description: JS source dir for JSON copy (relative to project root).

licenseSrcDir.description: License files dir (relative to project root).

npmBinDir.description: Npm bin scripts dir (relative to project root).

webpackConfig.description: Webpack config to copy into bin/ (relative to project root).

artifactsDir.description: Artifacts dir for dist copy (relative to project root).

outputDir.description: Assembled package output dir (relative to project root).

srcExcludes.description: Globs excluded from source-JS copy (relative to transpiledDir).

distExcludes.description: Globs excluded from dist copy (relative to artifactsDir).

nestedPackageJsonExcludes.description: Globs excluded from JSON copy to skip nested sub-packages whose own package.json must not merge into the parent tarball.

excludeLicenseValidator.description: Glob of a license validator file to exclude during source-JS copy (e.g. exclude default validator in internal mode, or exclude internal validator in default mode).

renameLicenseValidator.description: Post-assembly rename: every file matching fromGlob is renamed to toBasename in its directory. Used in internal mode to promote 'license_validation_internal.js' to 'license_validation.js'.

fromGlob.description: Glob matching files to rename (relative to outputDir).

licenseTemplateFile.description: License header template (relative to project root).

eulaUrl.description: EULA URL embedded in the license header.

metadataFiles.description: Files copied after assembly. 'from' resolved against projectRoot, 'to' against outputDir.

flatten.description: Secondary dirs populated by copying sub-trees from outputDir. 'from' vs outputDir, 'to' vs projectRoot.
